title: Lead Investment Banker at Deloitte India

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Deloitte India
jsonLd.description:
Deloitte India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Investment Banker to join our dynamic team in Meerut. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Deloitte India:
Deloitte India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Power BI

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Deloitte India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
